summary: Color graded montage of Trump's visit to China, set to music under a Trump voiceover about a 250 year 'bond of commerce and respect' between the American and Chinese people. It includes title cards ('WELCOMING BANQUET / MAY 14, 2026'), a nighttime wide shot with moving text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP' and an animated white line graphic of architecture over the Great Hall, slow shots of gold chandeliers, and a handshake between Trump and Xi.

script.scene: Slow upward-tracking shot of the Great Hall ceiling with large gold chandeliers and painted coffers; deep color. VO: 'The relationship between the American and Chinese people goes all the way back to America's founding.'

Trump at a podium on a red-lit stage, title card overlay 'WELCOMING BANQUET / 2026 / MAY 14, 2026'; audience in silhouette in the foreground. VO: 'From the beginning, our citizens have shared a deep sense of mutual respect.'

Wide shot of the banquet hall, Trump greeting Xi amid red drapery and floral tables, press cameras blurred; red and blue grade. VO: 'The bond of commerce and respect that stretches back 250 years is the foundation for a future that benefits both of our nations.'
Trump and Xi shake hands in a receiving line flanked by delegations; warm lighting. VO: 'The American and Chinese people share much in common. We value hard work.'

Nighttime wide shot of the floodlit Great Hall, Trump's motorcade and a walking delegation on a red carpet, an animated white line graphic of architecture and moving text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.' VO: 'We value courage and achievement. We love our families and we love our countries.'

notable_text: This bond of commerce and respect that stretches back 250 years is the foundation for a future that benefits both of our nations.
